title: TRANSITION SERVICES - 211info
text: HASL CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING TRANSITION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with transitioning from school into the community, the workforce, or extended education. 305 NE E Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Ages 14-25 with significant disabilities Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 9am-3pm, Wednesday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (541) 479-4275 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-4275 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between 9th and 9th street. Services: Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS ORGANIZATIONAL DEVELOPMENT AND MANAGEMENT SERVICES - ADA COMPLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - CENTERS FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HASL CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING
